query: Book Across the Bay cross country ski race Ashland to Washburn

videos.title: Book Across The Bay Cross Country Ski Race 2018
videos.description: This video is of the 2018 Book Across The Bay Ski Race.  You start by parking your vehicle in Washburn, Wi.  You then hop on a school bus, and you are driven to Ashland, Wi.  You and about 3500 other close friends then ski across the Bay to Washburn, Wi.  There are rest stops and water stops every kilometer.  The first 4 were nothing to write home about.  After that they get better.  The best is at 8 k.  They have a fire breathing dragon.  It is at about 2:30 in the video.  It is usually held the week before the Birkebeiner.  It is all lake skiing with the greatest rise being about 16".  You should check the weather for cast before registering.  It could be 0 F.  with a 20 mph wind.  Last year it was 50 degrees F. for 3 days before, and skiing through 10 km of ice water may not appeal to all.  Somehow the computer didn't recognize me.  I estimate that I finished about 1080.

videos.title: Book Across The Bay 2017 (official)
videos.description: With our hearts full of Book Across the Bay spirit, and our boots full of water, we all made the best of the warm weather and had a great #BATB

videos.title: First ever ski race - BATB(Book Across The Bay) 2022 Race Report - 10k ski race
videos.description:
This is my(Beth's) race report of book across the bay which is a cross country ski race that goes from Ashland, WI to Washburn, WI. This 10Km race starts at 6pm and is lit by luminaries. This was my first ever cross country ski race but I hope to do more. 

https://www.batb.org/

VIDEO CHAPTERS
0:00 - Intro
0:16 - Race Overview 
1:42 - Gear (clothing)
5:57 - Ski boots
6:06 - Things in my pockets
7:37 - Waxed skis in prep 
7:47 - On the road 
8:35 - Bib pick up
9:21 - Waiting for the race to start 
10:17 - Mins leading up to the race
10:34 - Start of the race 
10:47 - Course overlay 
11:08 - Story of the race 
12:49 - Finish line
13:26 - Party and Fireworks
14:08 - Course Conditions 
15:16 - Outro
tags: BATB(Book Across The Bay) 2022 Race Report - 10k ski race

videos.title: Book Across The Bay 2017
videos.description:
There is nothing quite like a 10K race across a frozen bay of Lake Superior for an athletic challenge. I did it on snow shoes. 

This year was a real challenge: there was standing water on the ice. With temperatures in the 50's the week of the race, all of the snow on the ice cover (about 20 inches thick) had melted. So you had ice, covered with standing water. 

Not just cold, but almost freezing. Wet feet before the race even started. 

But I finished. The final time was 2:19 - the clock I read at the end was for wave 1 - I was in wave 3.

I hope you find it amusing. 

I do too, now that my feet have finally thawed out.

If you'd like to read about it, you can visit the blog at http://www.commotioninthepews.com. 

Oh, the temperature got "winded away" at the start - it was in the fifties for three days before race time.

videos.title: Book Across the Bay 2008
videos.description: Learn about the biggest-ever Book Across the Bay -- a cross-country ski race that crosses the Chequamegon Bay from Ashland to Washburn -- in this video by Daily Press staffers Linda Olson, Chad Dally and Kevin O'Brien. Visit www.ashlandwi.com for more Daily Press news.
videos.transcript:
[Music]
[Applause]
steers and their families enjoyed a
perfect mix of winter weather and
Community spirit this weekend at the
12th annual book across the bay events
got underway Saturday on Ashton's
Waterfront as a record number of skiers
got ready for the Frozen track across
ran Bay to
wasburn the start of the race actually
had to be delayed for 15 minutes to
allow for all the last minute Racers to
get to the starting
line mild temperatures fresh snow and
solid ice made for great race conditions
once they arrived on the other side the
skiers were greeted by Lively Spectators
live music hot chili and a nice bonfire
on washburn's Waterfront
I

videos.title: Book Across the Bay
videos.description: The most exotic ski/snowshoe race/walk in the world. Straight across the frozen ice of Chequamegon Bay on Lake Superior between Ashland and Washburn Wisconsin

videos.title: Book Across the Bay
videos.description: The 10-kilometer ski and snowshoe race from Ashland to Washburn follows a course on frozen Lake Superior that's marked by ice luminaries.

videos.title: Ice Luminary Magic The Book Video 2
videos.description: Why did I write a crazy-good book about ice luminaries? Because I love making ice luminaries and no one had done it before!
videos.transcript:
[Music]
my mother was an absolute amazing person
and when we moved from a warm climate to
a cold climate she looked for all sorts
of things that would get us outside and
enjoy winter she taught us how to
ice-skate how to build Fonzie huts ski
how to do anything in the coal to
celebrate what winter is if you get out

videos.title: Antarctica Expedition Lines Don’t Tell You This, Until You’re On Board!
videos.description:
On all three Antarctic trips I've been on, I’ve seen so many passengers thrown by the same things each time. All because expedition lines are not totally transparent until passengers get on board. Then the truth comes out. It often comes as a big shock to many. So, here are the six things I see most passengers are surprised about Antarctic cruising once they get on board.
